race.comment: SHAQUE D'AMOUR (5) has placed six of eight around this circuit and has placed on all going. Will take benefit from a few key scratchings and looks very hard to toss against this line-up. The well-related SHERIFF'S STAR (6) (half to G3 winner Tornado Valley) resumes here but has shown enough in previous campaigns to warrant serious consideration in a race like this. One for the exotics players. FUNHOUSE (2) will be better for that debut performance and can feature with natural improvement. RAGING (4) has placed over this track and trip and strips fitter second-up from the break. Shouldn't be dismissed lightly.
